script.title: Jonah and the Whale 🐋 | Bible Story for Kids

scenes.narration: Long ago, God asked a man named Jonah to go to the big city of Nineveh and share a special message of love and warning.
scenes.image_prompt: Colorful storybook illustration of Jonah, a kind bearded man in a flowing robe, standing on a sunlit hillside with a large glowing city in the distance, bright cheerful sky, soft watercolor style, family-friendly

scenes.narration: But Jonah felt afraid and tried to run away from God. He got on a ship sailing far in the opposite direction across the deep blue sea.
scenes.image_prompt: Cheerful children's book illustration of Jonah boarding a wooden sailing ship at a bright seaside harbor, seagulls flying, blue waves, warm golden sunlight, soft colors, family-friendly storybook style

scenes.narration: Soon a mighty storm rolled in, tossing the ship like a toy. The sailors were frightened, and Jonah knew the storm was because he ran from God.
scenes.image_prompt: Dramatic but kid-friendly illustration of a wooden ship on giant rolling waves, big puffy storm clouds, lightning flickering softly, sailors holding onto ropes, bright storybook colors, wonder-filled mood

scenes.narration: Jonah told them to toss him into the sea so the storm would stop. The sailors gently lowered him into the waves, and the wind grew calm again.
scenes.image_prompt: Warm storybook illustration of Jonah being lowered into the ocean by caring sailors, calming waves around him, soft sunbeams breaking through the clouds, peaceful atmosphere, gentle colors, family-friendly

scenes.narration: Suddenly, a giant whale swam up from the deep and gently swallowed Jonah whole. Inside the whale, Jonah was safe, and he began to pray.
scenes.image_prompt: Whimsical children's illustration of an enormous friendly blue whale opening its mouth in the ocean with Jonah inside, glowing light, tiny sea stars, bubbles, bright storybook colors, wonder and awe

scenes.narration: For three whole days, Jonah prayed and thanked God. He told God he was sorry and promised to listen and obey with his whole heart.
scenes.image_prompt: Cozy storybook illustration of Jonah kneeling inside the warm glowing belly of the whale, softly lit by a heavenly light, hands folded in prayer, peaceful expression, magical bioluminescent glow, gentle colors

scenes.narration: Then the whale swam to shore and carefully placed Jonah on the sandy beach. Jonah was amazed by God's kindness and second chances.
scenes.image_prompt: Joyful storybook scene of a friendly giant whale gently resting Jonah on a sunny sandy beach, seashells and palm trees, bright blue sky, warm golden light, cheerful children's book illustration style

scenes.narration: Jonah ran to Nineveh and shared God's message. The whole city listened and turned their hearts to God. You can always trust God's plan, too.
scenes.image_prompt: Vibrant storybook illustration of Jonah preaching in a bustling ancient city of Nineveh, smiling families listening, golden sunshine, colorful tents and buildings, doves flying overhead, warm and uplifting family-friendly style
